surfaces.evidence: lib/scholarships/public-scholarship-read-model.ts consumes F-0/F-1 JSON and the page renders PublicScholarshipDataStatus.
surfaces.user_visible_state: Report snapshot date, public/hidden counts, fail-closed limitation, and attachment verification limit are visible.
surfaces.disposition: retain with explicit boundary until controlled DB projection parity

surfaces.evidence: PublicScholarshipDetail renders report snapshot status, source identifier, original notice link, and attachment limitation.
surfaces.user_visible_state: The item is distinguished from a live DB projection before the content is read.
surfaces.disposition: retain with explicit boundary until controlled DB projection parity

surfaces.evidence: The route reads scholarships through Supabase; no local credentialed browser verification is part of K.
surfaces.user_visible_state: Existing product route is preserved; it is not represented as the G report projection.
surfaces.disposition: preserve numeric route and reconcile in L

surfaces.evidence: The queue queries crawled_notices and K adds source ID, body/attachment evidence, last observation, compatibility lifecycle wording, and terminal-state action guards. The local credential-free browser returned HTTP 500 before content rendered.
surfaces.user_visible_state: The intended operator state is explicit in implementation, but K does not claim an authenticated visual observation in the blocked local environment.
surfaces.disposition: retain as compatibility layer until approved cutover

surfaces.evidence: The detail route and server actions block re-registration for non-new notices and label the current legacy lifecycle. The local credential-free browser returned HTTP 500 before content rendered.
surfaces.user_visible_state: Closed review behavior is implemented and build-verified; authenticated rendering remains blocked in the K environment.
surfaces.disposition: retain and migrate through a Phase L compatibility projection

surfaces.evidence: app/admin/scholarships/actions.ts keeps authenticated direct CRUD and numeric IDs.
surfaces.user_visible_state: No crawler public-projection claim is made for direct CRUD.

surfaces.evidence: The route consumes repository diagnostic reports and K adds a read-only snapshot notice, but the local admin environment returned HTTP 500 before the route rendered.
surfaces.user_visible_state: The implementation explicitly says it is not live crawler monitoring and cannot mutate state; authenticated rendering was not claimed.
surfaces.disposition: replace inputs with integrated run evidence in L without creating a parallel diagnostics route

misleading_prototype_findings.finding: G public report data could be mistaken for live DB-backed scholarship projection.
misleading_prototype_findings.evidence: PublicScholarshipDataStatus on list and report detail routes.

misleading_prototype_findings.finding: Repository diagnostics could be mistaken for live crawler monitoring.
A closed crawled notice could be opened directly and re-promoted into another scholarship record.
misleading_prototype_findings.evidence: Admin review detail returns a closed-state view when status is not new; promotion checks new/unlinked state; restore accepts rejected/unlinked rows only.

misleading_prototype_findings.finding: The current review mutation lifecycle could be mistaken for an append-only decision or controlled public projection.
misleading_prototype_findings.evidence: Admin review queue and detail lifecycle sections.
